steps.title: Compare La Torre 6B to La Torre 6A in the table
steps.content: The table shows La Torre 6B with a 28.9 cm footprint versus La Torre 6A's 32.8 cm (shorter), and a 5.57 m stride versus La Torre 6A's 5.23 m (longer).

steps.title: Find the choice that matches both comparisons
steps.content: Choice C states “shorter footprint, and longer average stride”—the exact comparison shown in the table. A, B, and D each misstate one or both values. This matches choice C — C is correct.
